name: AT&T Inc.
lede: AT&T runs four centers across four Indian cities. Gurugram, Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Chennai, covering GBS and R&D, built over 26 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AT&T office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AT&T Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AT&T runs 4 verified centers across 4 Indian cities (Gurugram, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai), covering GBS and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: CEO AT&T Communication Services India, VP India Development Center

about.description: AT&T's India footprint covers Gurugram, Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Chennai, spanning GBS and R&D. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 109 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does AT&T operate in India?
faq.a: AT&T operates 4 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AT&T have centers in?
faq.a: AT&T's India footprint includes Gurugram and 3 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does AT&T run in India?
faq.a: AT&T runs GBS and 1 additional center types centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AT&T's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for AT&T's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AT&T's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at AT&T's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.
